strings.dialogue.tavern.look.01: The tavern door is warm, though the harbor has been cold for years.
strings.dialogue.tavern.talk.01: I try talking to the door. The door, in a shocking break from etiquette, stays quiet.
strings.dialogue.hook.pickup.01: A rusty hook. Not elegant, but it might still persuade old wood.
strings.dialogue.tavern.use-hook.01: The hook catches the latch. Crude? Yes. Effective? Also yes.
strings.dialogue.tavern.return.01: Back to the dock before the keeper decides to wake up.
